description.example: Write comprehensive documentation for the API endpoints

dueDate.description: Due date for the task in ISO 8601 format. Use null to remove due date

startAt.description: Start date for the task in ISO 8601 format. Use null to remove start date

endAt.description: End date for the task in ISO 8601 format. Use null to remove end date

completedAt.description: Completion timestamp. Use null to mark the task as incomplete

tagIds.description: Array of tag IDs to associate with the task. Replaces all existing tags

taskId.description: Task ID associated with this comment

body.example: Wrapped up pomodoro #1, still need to draft summary.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated

body.example: Summarized what happened during today’s session.

startTime.description: Timestamp when the timer was started

endTime.description: Timestamp when the timer was ended (null for active timers)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the timer was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the timer was last updated

activities.description: Timeline entries combining timers and comments in descending timestamp order

taskId.description: ID of the task to start timer for

startTime.description: Timestamp when the timer should start

endTime.description: Timestamp when the timer ended. Use null to remove end time

connected.description: Whether the user has a valid OAuth connection

id.description: Unique identifier for the account record

email.description: Email associated with the provider account

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the account was linked

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary calendar

isAlreadyAdded.description: Whether this calendar has already been added

calendars.description: List of available calendars from provider

isEnabled.description: Whether the calendar is enabled for sync

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the calendar was added

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the calendar was last updated

name.description: Custom display name (defaults to provider name)

calendarId.description: Calendar ID this event belongs to

isAllDay.description: Whether this is an all-day event

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was imported

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was last updated

archivedAt.description: Set to an ISO 8601 timestamp to archive, or null to unarchive

startAt.description: Start date for the task in ISO 8601 format

endAt.description: End date for the task in ISO 8601 format

get.description: Check if the API is running

schema.description: Filter tasks by whether they have an active timer running

parameters.description: Filter tasks by whether they have an active timer running
parameters.name: hasActiveTimer

schema.description: Filter tasks by whether they have a scheduled start time (startAt). true = only scheduled tasks, false = only unscheduled tasks. When false is combined with startAtFrom/startAtTo, uses OR logic: shows tasks in the date range OR unscheduled tasks

parameters.description: Filter tasks by whether they have a scheduled start time (startAt). true = only scheduled tasks, false = only unscheduled tasks. When false is combined with startAtFrom/startAtTo, uses OR logic: shows tasks in the date range OR unscheduled tasks
parameters.name: scheduled

schema.description: Filter tasks with startAt >= this timestamp (inclusive). When combined with scheduled=false, uses OR logic to also include unscheduled tasks

parameters.description: Filter tasks with startAt >= this timestamp (inclusive). When combined with scheduled=false, uses OR logic to also include unscheduled tasks
parameters.name: startAtFrom

schema.description: Filter tasks with startAt < this timestamp (exclusive). When combined with scheduled=false, uses OR logic to also include unscheduled tasks

parameters.description: Filter tasks with startAt < this timestamp (exclusive). When combined with scheduled=false, uses OR logic to also include unscheduled tasks
parameters.name: startAtTo

schema.description: Sort tasks by field (createdAt, startAt, or dueDate)

parameters.description: Sort tasks by field (createdAt, startAt, or dueDate)
parameters.name: sortBy

schema.description: Sort order: asc (ascending/oldest first) or desc (descending/newest first). Defaults to desc

parameters.description: Sort order: asc (ascending/oldest first) or desc (descending/newest first). Defaults to desc
parameters.name: order

schema.description: When true, tasks with null values for the sort field appear last. Useful for sorting by startAt to show scheduled tasks first, then unscheduled tasks

parameters.description: When true, tasks with null values for the sort field appear last. Useful for sorting by startAt to show scheduled tasks first, then unscheduled tasks
parameters.name: nullsLast

schema.description: Filter tasks by tag IDs (comma-separated). Returns tasks with ANY of the specified tags (OR logic)

parameters.description: Filter tasks by tag IDs (comma-separated). Returns tasks with ANY of the specified tags (OR logic)
parameters.name: tags
